mentions.note: Beef cost inflation is real pressure, but 2.6% yield, great reputation, 21x earnings with room to 18–19x. DCA strategy: buy at $280, $279, $270, $265, and 50 shares at $260 to build better cost basis.
Missed quarter is rare; unlikely to repeat. Fast food fortress beaten down; recovery play.
Selling at 21x earnings, breaking down; 2.7% yield acceptable; want to buy on pullback if yield hits 3%; QSR better company but MCD buyable on weakness.
Reports Thursday; always surprises to upside; value package very popular; competition less effective; stock drifting lower but fundamentals solid—buy it.
